title: (No AI) Lovable says it has hit $500M in annualized revenue, with 1 million new projects a week

title: (No AI) Apple’s AI promises are finally, almost, sort of, here
author: Hayden Field
content:
![A photo of the new Siri customization experience.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/lcimg-e9a9ad41-eb47-49f2-80a4-3fb06df3a0d1.jpeg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Apple kicked off its annual developer conference with bold promises about AI. The company, CEO Tim Cook said, would be "introducing new technologies and innovations that push the limits on what's possible." But its slew of announcements - centered on a brand-new "Siri AI" - had more to do with catching up.

After almost entirely neglecting Siri and punting its AI promises down the road in 2025, Apple went all in on the tech this year. It pitched Siri as an all-encompassing virtual assistant that ties together all your Apple devices, with multimodal features, a dedicated app, an all-in-one AI agent and more. Executives emphasized privacy aga …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/946780/apples-ai-promises-are-finally-almost-sort-of-here)

After almost entirely neglecting Siri and punting its AI promises down the road in 2025, Apple went all in on the tech this year. Executives emphasized privacy aga …

title: (No AI) Apple’s best AI idea looks a lot like vibe coding
author: David Pierce
content:
![A picture of a finished shortcut depicting a messaging flow.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/AI-Apple-Shortcuts.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Most of Apple's current AI ideas are roughly the same as everyone else's AI ideas. A chatbot you can ask questions; quick ways to create or summarize text; bizarre, borderline creepy image-generation tools. The company spent [most of its WWDC keynote](https://www.theverge.com/tech/945693/apple-wwdc-2026-biggest-announcements-ios-27) playing catch-up with the state of the AI art, [announcing Siri features](https://www.theverge.com/tech/942416/apple-siri-ai-update-wwdc) you can already find on Android phones and in the Claude and ChatGPT apps. The pitch, in so many cases, is just "this thing you know, but on your iPhone now."

But a few minutes after I downloaded the first developer beta of iPadOS 26 (I didn't want to risk it on my Mac or my iPhone, both of which are too important to my dail …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/tech/946733/apple-shortcuts-ai-safari-tabs-vibe-code)

creator: Katie Drummond
title: (No AI) Alex Vindman Survived Trump’s Retaliation Machine. Now He’s Running for Senate
dc:creator: Katie Drummond
content: In 2019, Alex Vindman testified during President Trump’s first impeachment trial–a decision that ended his military career. Now he wants to challenge the president from the halls of Congress.
contentSnippet: In 2019, Alex Vindman testified during President Trump’s first impeachment trial–a decision that ended his military career. Now he wants to challenge the president from the halls of Congress.

creator: Paresh Dave, Maxwell Zeff
title: (No AI) OpenAI Confidentially Files for IPO on the Heels of SpaceX and Anthropic
dc:creator: Paresh Dave, Maxwell Zeff
content: The ChatGPT-maker announced it has filed paperwork to go public, just a week after rival Anthropic took the same step.
contentSnippet: The ChatGPT-maker announced it has filed paperwork to go public, just a week after rival Anthropic took the same step.
